feedItems.description: allocated £102.1m to Roads & Transport (≈£82 per resident)
allocated £544.9m to Adult Social Care (≈£436 per resident)
allocated £246.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£197 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £87 (4.9%) to £1846
